name: Yellow Ninja
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>黄色い</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>イエロー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>忍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>にん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If this card is Normal Summoned or flipped face-up: You can Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower "Ninja" monster from your hand in Attack Position or face-down Defense Position, also you cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except "Ninja" monsters. You can only use this effect of "Yellow Ninja" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal Summoned or flipped face-up: You can Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower "Ninja" monster from your hand in Attack Position or face-down Defense Position, also you cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except "Ninja" monsters. You can only use this effect of "Yellow Ninja" once per turn.
eff: If this card is Normal Summoned or flipped face-up: You can Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower "Ninja" monster from your hand in Attack Position or face-down Defense Position, also you cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except "Ninja" monsters. You can only use this effect of "Yellow Ninja" once per turn.

summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
Restricts the player's Special Summons to archetype specific monsters
